title: 小学生自然探索
description: 8场景×5秒=40秒，连续中文配音，1280×704横屏
prompts: A breathtaking cartoon sunrise over misty mountains with golden sunlight painting the sky orange and pink, birds flying in V formation, nature documentary style
A lush green cartoon rainforest with a colorful parrot perched on a branch, tropical flowers blooming, butterflies fluttering around, vibrant greens
A gentle cartoon savanna scene with a baby elephant playing in a small watering hole, acacia trees in background, warm golden light
A peaceful cartoon coral reef with a sea turtle gliding over colorful corals and tropical fish, crystal clear turquoise water
A magical cartoon winter forest scene with snow-covered pine trees and a deer walking through fresh snow, soft blue-white lighting
A cheerful cartoon garden full of blooming sunflowers with bees collecting pollen, ladybugs on leaves, bright warm sunshine
A dramatic cartoon desert scene with a camel walking across golden sand dunes under a brilliant orange sunset sky, cacti silhouettes
A beautiful cartoon waterfall cascading down mossy rocks into a crystal pool surrounded by ferns and orchids, misty rainbows in the air
